summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Mealtap website major restructure. All features working perfectly - public page customer-focused, investor page with stats/metrics, proper navigation, form submissions functional.
passed_tests: Backend API endpoints (9/9 tests passed)
Public page hero with correct tagline 'Your favorite meals are just one chat away'
Phone number 0908 112 2220 displayed correctly
Public page navbar with How It Works, User Flows, Brand, Team, For Investors links
How It Works section with 3 WhatsApp iPhone screenshots
User Flows section with 3 working tabs (Customer, Vendor, Rider)
Brand Showcase section with billboard, signage/bag, delivery notification images
Team section showing 'Chef Mike' (correctly renamed from 'Atolagbe Michael O.')
Investor stats (60%, 8%, 67%) correctly absent from public page
Competition text (Jumia/Bolt/Chowdeck) correctly removed from public page
Investor page (/investors) loads with investor-focused content
Investor page Problem section with stats (60%, 8%, 67%)
Investor page Market Stats section with 4 stat cards and metrics table
Investor page Business Model with 3 revenue streams and 4 competitive advantages
Investor page navbar with Problem, Market, Business Model, Team, Public Page links
Request Pitch Deck modal opens and form submission works (POST to /api/pitch-deck-request)
Join Waitlist modal opens and form submission works (POST to /api/waitlist-request)
Navigation between public and investor pages works correctly
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
Form validation working correctly for required fields
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (9/9 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all features working)
